stemHtml: During a pilot's medical revalidation, if they are informed of complete blindness in one eye, will they lose all or only some cues of depth perception?

options.a: The degree of loss of depth perception will depend on the specific circumstances of the pilot's condition.
options.b: The pilot will not experience any loss of depth perception.
options.c: The pilot will experience a partial loss of depth perception.
options.d: The pilot will experience a complete loss of depth perception.
